SlipMate — MIDI Spike C

tauri-plugin-midi (WebMIDI shim over midir/CoreMIDI) ↔ Pioneer DDJ-FLX4. Tests input, the position-query SysEx round-trip, and LED output.

No FLX4 detected — plug in the DDJ-FLX4 over USB. The plugin polls every 1 s, so the device should appear here within a second of connecting.
